content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.bankr.polymarket
FILE: cosmos/integration/bankr/polymarket.py (305 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Bankr Polymarket Integration.

Provides prediction market access via Bankr API.

CLASSES:
- Market: Prediction market information.
  Methods: def from_response(cls, data: Dict) -> 'Market'
- BetResult: Result of placing a bet.
  Methods: def from_job_result(cls, job: JobResult) -> 'BetResult'
  Methods: def error_result(cls, error: str) -> 'BetResult'
- Position: User's position in a market.
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: Dict) -> 'Position'
- BankrPolymarket: Polymarket prediction market operations via Bankr API.

Provides:
- Market brows
  Methods: async def get_odds(self, market_query: str) -> Dict[str, float]
  Methods: async def search_markets(self, query: str) -> List[Market]
  Methods: async def get_market(self, market_id: str) -> Optional[Market]
  Methods: async def place_bet(self, market: str, outcome: str, amount_usd: float) -> BetResult
  Methods: async def get_positions(self) -> List[Position]
  Methods: async def get_trending_markets(self) -> List[Market]
  Methods: async def execute(self, intent: Any) -> BetResult
